---
title: "Get Started"
description: "Install jaxcmr and run your first simulation"
---

## Installation

Install the latest stable version using pip:

```bash
pip install jaxcmr
```

Or install the development version from GitHub:

```bash
pip install git+https://github.com/githubpsyche/jaxcmr
```

### JAX Accelerators

jaxcmr uses [JAX](https://github.com/google/jax) for fast computation. By default, JAX runs on CPU. For GPU acceleration:

```bash
# CUDA (NVIDIA GPUs)
pip install -U "jax[cuda12]"

# Metal (Apple Silicon)
pip install jax-metal
```

## Next Steps

- [Quickstart](quickstart.qmd) - Run your first CMR simulation
- [Concepts](../concepts/) - Understand the library architecture
